data.body: 264f held-out TDD: 3 happy (seam: resolve_mapping/jira_account_id/identity_email) + 4 held-out (differ sentinel on 3-tuple, no-sentinel on search, update_issue skips validate+no-flag-leak, set_reporter raw PUT).
